headline: BMO Capital Trims Eversource Energy (ES) Forecast After First-Quarter Update
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 4.57% as of May 29, Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) is included among the Dividend Aristocrats Ranked By Yield: Top 10 Stocks. On May 11, BMO Capital analyst James Thalacker lowered the firm’s price recommendation on Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) to $73 from $75. He reiterated a Market Perform rating on the stock […]
